atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reads preserve typed account-load and per-slot storage-read failure errors.

destinations.snippet:
AccountLoadFailed(String),
StorageReadFailed { slot: String, executor: Address, reason: String }
destinations.evidence: The same error variants are present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Force account load and storage slot read failures and assert the specific RegistryReadError variants include executor/slot context.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.source_hunk_hint: new file: RegistryReadError service count limit
atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reads expose a typed service-count limit violation for corrupted or malicious registry state.

destinations.evidence: The same limit error variant is present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Mock serviceAddresses length greater than MAX_SERVICES and assert ExecutorCountExceeded carries count and max.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.source_hunk_hint: new file: RegistryReadError public key limit
atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reads expose a typed public-key length violation with executor context.

destinations.snippet: PublicKeyLengthExceeded { length: usize, max: usize, executor: Address }
destinations.evidence: The same public key length error variant is present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Mock a dynamic public key length greater than MAX_PUBLIC_KEY_LEN and assert PublicKeyLengthExceeded carries the executor.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

atoms.semantic_claim: TEE registry reads expose a typed not-found error for missing executor addresses.

destinations.evidence: The same not-found error variant is present in the v2.2 port.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Ask for an executor whose payment address slot is zero and assert the not-found path can surface ExecutorNotFound where used.
atoms.notes: Exact code exists byte-for-byte in the v2.2 port at the same path.

summary: TEE registry reader error variants are exactly present in the v2.2 port.
notes: The added file is byte-for-byte present at the same path; atoms split the typed negative paths.
